clusters.title: Green earthquake (Magnitude 4.6M, Depth:10km) in South Of Panama 19/06/2026 00:07 UTC, No people affected in 100km.
clusters.recommended_action: Nicht reflexhaft reagieren. Quelle sichern, Kontext prüfen, Risiko dokumentieren und Gegenmaßnahme vorbereiten.
clusters.dominance_reason: large emitter without cross-source resonance or high-signal term

resonance_ranking.principle: Authority is capped; early novelty, cross-source breadth, momentum and baseline deviation carry ranking.
resonance_ranking.dominance_guard: Large emitters keep credibility but receive no automatic dominance without resonance or high-signal terms.
